trace_schema_version.description: Bumped when the emitted node/edge shape changes incompatibly.
trace_schema_version.title: Trace Schema Version

scope.description: Whether the DAG was rooted at a campaign or a single run's lineage.
scope.title: Scope

format.description: `dag` includes edges + per-wave nodes; `flat` is the run list only; `dot` is the full dag plus a rendered Graphviz `dot` string.
format.title: Format

campaign_id.description: The campaign tag, when scope == 'campaign'; null for run scope.
campaign_id.title: Campaign Id

root.description: Node id of the DAG root (`campaign:<id>` or `run:<seed>`).
root.title: Root

signature.description: The provenance-manifest self-attesting signature for this campaign (64-hex). Campaign scope only â€” null for run scope.
signature.title: Signature

nodes.description: Heterogeneous nodes keyed by `kind`: a `campaign` node, one `run` node per run (carrying its provenance fingerprint + lifecycle status + timing), and one `wave` node per wave (dag format only).
nodes.title: Nodes

edges.description: Directed edges by `rel`: `member` (runâ†’campaign membership), `derived-from` (runâ†’parent run lineage via parent_run_ids), and `contains` (runâ†’wave). Empty in `flat` format.
edges.title: Edges

dot.description: Graphviz DOT rendering of the DAG â€” populated only in `dot` format, null otherwise. Pipe it to `dot -Tsvg` to draw the graph.
dot.title: Dot
